_comment: Report-only mutation testing scoped to lib/mainutil.js (deferred from PR #33). Uses the command test runner (no native node:test plugin exists) invoking node --test directly against ONLY tests/mainutil.test.js -- NOT `npm run test:js`, which also runs the much larger tests/renderer.test.js and would make whole-suite-per-mutant mutation testing too slow. ignorePatterns excludes dist/ (electron-builder --dir output, ~1.5GB) so Stryker's sandbox copy stays fast; node_modules/.git are always-ignored by Stryker itself. See CLAUDE.md / package.json scripts for the underlying test commands.
